project_title: Rare earth recovery from industrial waste
project_description: We are developing a pilot process to recover rare earth elements and other critical raw materials from industrial and electronic waste. The solution combines selective separation, material traceability, and recovered-material quality validation for European manufacturers. It aims to increase secondary raw-material supply and reduce dependency on imported strategic materials.
good_top_3_notes: Top results should focus on critical or strategic raw materials, recovery, recycling, processing, or dependency reduction.

project_description: Our project will recover lithium, nickel, cobalt, and graphite from end-of-life batteries and upgrade them into battery-grade secondary materials. The process is designed for pilot-scale validation with recyclers and battery manufacturers, improving circularity, reducing waste, and strengthening the European battery value chain.
likely_false_positive_patterns: generic energy storage without materials recovery
good_top_3_notes: Top results should concern battery materials, recycling, refining, circularity, or materials upgrading rather than generic e-mobility.

project_description: We are developing an energy-management solution for European ports that coordinates shore power, renewable electricity, battery storage, and berth demand. Port authorities and terminal operators will use it to reduce vessel emissions at berth, manage electricity peaks, and plan cost-effective port infrastructure upgrades.
good_top_3_notes: Top results should combine ports or shipping with energy, electrification, shore-side infrastructure, or emissions reduction.

project_title: Green hydrogen infrastructure for industrial port clusters
project_description: The project will demonstrate green hydrogen production, storage, and distribution infrastructure in an industrial port cluster. It targets port authorities, terminal operators, shipping companies, and nearby industrial users. The pilot will integrate renewable electricity and hydrogen logistics to decarbonise heavy transport and industrial energy demand.
good_top_3_notes: Top results should address hydrogen production, infrastructure, storage, logistics, or industrial deployment.

project_title: Digital optimisation for maritime freight and ports
project_description: We are building a digital optimisation platform for ports, vessel operators, freight terminals, and logistics providers. It will improve vessel scheduling, cargo-flow coordination, multimodal connections, and supply-chain resilience while reducing waiting time, fuel consumption, and transport emissions.
good_top_3_notes: Top results should be visibly maritime, port, freight, or multimodal-logistics related.

project_title: Resilience and anomaly detection for critical port infrastructure
project_description: This project develops a security and resilience platform for critical port infrastructure using sensor fusion, anomaly detection, and real-time operational monitoring. Port authorities and terminal operators will use it to detect physical and cyber threats, protect essential logistics operations, and improve crisis response.
likely_false_positive_patterns: disaster topics with no infrastructure link
good_top_3_notes: Top results should concern critical-infrastructure protection, security, disaster resilience, monitoring, or crisis response, preferably with transport relevance.

project_title: Industrial scale-up support for clean-technology SMEs
project_description: We are creating a cross-border support programme for clean-technology SMEs and industrial start-ups that need pilot customers, demonstration partners, investment readiness, and market-entry support. The programme will connect scale-ups with manufacturers, ports, energy operators, and regional innovation organisations to accelerate commercial deployment in Europe.
good_top_3_notes: Top results should visibly support SMEs, start-ups, scale-ups, market uptake, demonstration, or industrial innovation ecosystems.

project_description: We want to create a platform that helps companies identify greener technologies, connect with potential partners, and plan sustainability projects. The concept may include energy, circularity, and emissions reduction, but the initial sector focus and demonstration approach are not yet defined.
likely_false_positive_patterns: sector-specific calls presented as direct fits
good_top_3_notes: Results may be reviewable, but should not be presented as strong because the sector, technology, and impact pathway are broad.

project_description: We are exploring a regional collaboration service that helps innovation agencies, SMEs, universities, and public authorities share project opportunities and structure joint initiatives. The service should improve ecosystem coordination and funding readiness, but the technology and sector focus remain open.
good_top_3_notes: Innovation ecosystem or SME support calls are plausible, but status should remain cautious because the intervention is under-specified.

project_title: AI tool for industrial production planning
project_description: We are developing an AI tool for industrial companies to improve production planning, forecast resource demand, and identify operational bottlenecks. The intended users are manufacturing managers, but the pilot sector, data sources, maturity level, and quantified environmental impact still need to be defined.
likely_false_positive_patterns: energy calls with no planning relevance
good_top_3_notes: Manufacturing and industrial AI calls are plausible, but broad data or AI calls should not dominate and labels should remain cautious.

project_description: We want to build an innovative AI platform that uses data to improve services and create impact across Europe.
likely_false_positive_patterns: specific sector calls treated as direct fits
good_top_3_notes: The system may return starting points, but results should be labelled Needs more detail and no sector-specific call should look authoritative.

project_description: Codex output. Files changed: scripts/enrich_eu_promotion_candidates.py and tests/test_promotion_enrichment.py. Processed 50 records. Validation completed and 64 tests passed. Official EU evidence, TRL, eligibility, consortium metadata, source URLs, and SQLite hashes were checked. Main CSV and SQLite unchanged.
likely_false_positive_patterns: funding calls matched from TRL or eligibility vocabulary
good_top_3_notes: Any displayed results must be Needs more detail, and explanations should explicitly say the input looks driven by broad EU funding terminology.

project_title: Community arts and school inclusion programme
project_description: The project will support school teachers, youth workers, museums, and local cultural organisations in delivering inclusive arts education and community heritage activities. It aims to improve social participation, intercultural dialogue, and access to creative learning for disadvantaged young people.
good_top_3_notes: Because this is outside the curated focus, the safest outcome is no defensible result or only low-confidence starting points, not strong industrial matches.
The input should be treated as insufficient and any result status must be Needs more detail.
